behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names the constant LEGACY_INSIGHT_FILTERS_BLOCKED_FLAG, value 'legacy-insight-filters-disabled', function is_legacy_insight_filters_blocked, file posthog/api/insight.py, exact error message, HTTP 403, and all kwargs (groups, group_properties, send_feature_flag_events=False).

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes required behavior and API shape but does not provide the literal code diff; the agent must still write the implementation.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests check the constant, function name, and method name which are all explicitly required by the instruction; alternative implementations matching the spec would still pass.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests extract function source and exec it with mocked posthoganalytics, asserting call args and return values — actual execution, not text matching.

test_not_tautological.reason: Tests verify feature_enabled is called with specific args and returns propagate correctly; a stub returning False would fail test_filters_blocked_delegates_to_feature_flag which expects True.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Tests cover flag constant, no-distinct-id bypass, feature flag delegation with correct kwargs, and the 403 error behavior for legacy filter payloads.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are grouped with section comment headers (Gates, Fail-to-pass) and named descriptively.

structured_data_schema.reason: Task is code behavior, not structured data output.

no_typos.reason: Filenames, flag name, and function names are consistent between instruction, tests, and solution.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction names posthog/api/insight.py which is the natural file for Insights API work; no line numbers leaked.
